purpose: future compatible BAM or SAM alignment-mode consume coverage
generation_notes: The SAM and FASTA are the provenance root.
The source package contains three mapped single-end reads and one unmapped read against two synthetic references.
The planned CRAM is expected to require the explicit FASTA under strict reference policy.
The same planned CRAM should be used for both explicit-reference success and missing-reference failure scenarios.
reference_policy_notes: Strict consume tests should provide tests/fixtures/source/tiny.ref.primary.fasta explicitly.
Missing-reference failure is tested by withholding the FASTA, not by altering the CRAM fixture.
review_notes: Review the synthetic FASTA lengths and names against the SAM @SQ lines first.
Review the SAM header against the FASTA reference dictionary first.
Confirm that mapped read sequences match the intended reference spans and CIGAR lengths.
Treat regenerated BAM and CRAM artifacts as derived outputs whose drift may reflect toolchain changes.
